query.description: Filter by SIM ID. Must be at least 1.

request.description: Returns a list of calls. The calls are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created call appearing first.
Permanently deletes a call.

query.description: Filter by campaigns after a certain date. Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Must be a date before or equal to before.
Filter by campaigns before a certain date. Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Must be a date after or equal to after.

request.description: Returns a list of campaigns. The campaigns are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created campaign appearing first.
Retrieves a Campaign object.

item.name: List all devices used in a campaign

request.description: Returns a list of devices used in a campaign. The devices are returned with sims used in the campaign and status of the campaign on the device.

item.name: List all sending servers used in a campaign

request.description: Returns a list of sending servers used in a campaign. The sending servers are returned with sender ids used in the campaign and status of the campaign on the sending server.
Updates the specific campaign by setting the values of the parameters passed.
Permanently deletes a campaign. Also deletes all messages or USSD pulls associated with it. It cannot be undone.
Returns a list of contact lists. The contact lists are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created contact list appearing first.

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Retrieves a Contact List object.

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Updates the specific contact list by setting the values of the parameters passed.

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Permanently deletes the specific contact list. Also deletes all contacts and fields associated with it. It cannot be undone.

item.name: List all fields for a contact list

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Returns a list of fields for a contact list. The fields are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created field appearing first.
Retrieves a Field object.

item.name: Create a field for a contact list

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Updates the specific field by setting the values of the parameters passed. It is recommended to retrieve the field first to get the field's current state because partial updates are not supported.
Permanently deletes a field. Also deletes all associated field values of contacts. It cannot be undone.

item.name: List all contacts for a contact list

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Returns a list of contacts for a contact list. The contacts are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created contact appearing first.
Retrieves a Contact object.

item.name: Create a contact in a contact list

variable.description: The ID of the contact list.

request.description: Update a contact in a contact list with the given data. It is recommended to retrieve the contact first to get the contact's current state because partial updates are not supported.
Permanently deletes a contact. It cannot be undone.
Returns a list of devices. The devices are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created device appearing first.
